title: Pokemon Gen 3 Music Pack (Reactive Music)
description: Adds Pokemon Gen 3 from both Hoenn and Kanto (Ruby/Sapphire & FireRed/LeafGreen) music to Minecraft that reacts to what you are doing. Best used with Cobblemon!
body: Are you sad that you can't play Cobblemon while listening to your favorite Pokemon game's music? Well turn that frown upside-down! Now you can hear those nostalgic Gen 3 tunes and have them react to your location and activity! (Requires Reactive Music https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)
